productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Women Supergirl TT Pink Jacket
description: Composition Pink Jacket with the shell made of 100% polyester, has long sleeves with ribbed cuffs and the adidas patented Triple-Stripes, a ribbed neckline, embroidered branding on the left chest, zippered front placket with branded zippers, two zippered pockets on the front and a ribbed hem Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash No bleaching, dry cleaning Iron with medium heat Do not iron on print Combining sport and style is adidas' forte. This sweatshirt beats the winter chill with panache. Wear this to any off-duty event to look your best. Pair this with a subtly hued tee, classic denims and sports shoes to snazz up your style. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 5'8' and chest 33"
